jurisdictions._note: In Bexar County, there is no separate family court designation. All civil district courts (37th through 438th) have concurrent jurisdiction over family law matters including divorce, custody, and child support. Cases are randomly assigned among all civil courts. The child support courts have separate Associate Judges.
